/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -DBUILDING_NODE_EXTENSION -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/link.d -shared  -o Release/gfless.node CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/gfless_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/binding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/workspace/Launcher/src/auth/nostaleauth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/workspace/Launcher/src/auth/blackbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/workspace/Launcher/src/auth/fingerprint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/workspace/Launcher/src/auth/identity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/workspace/Launcher/src/syncnetworkaccessmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gfless.dir/qrc_resources.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.15
